company.title: Pushing the boundaries of {interactive}

hero.title: May the story never end!
hero.description: Grand Tale is the next generation open-world RPG from Rimelight Entertainment. Explore a living world shaped by player agency and emergent storytelling.

overview.title: About Grand Tale
overview.description: Grand Tale is a high-fantasy media franchise built around it's flagship game, the titular 'Grand Tale'.

hero.title: About Grand Tale
hero.description: Grand Tale is a high-fantasy social life-sim game which hosts sub-games of multiple genres. The game is set in a world where players can explore, create, and explore their own worlds. The game is a living, breathing world that respects your time and intelligence.

story.title: The story so far...
story.description: , where they find the Ohrn, a mysterious artifact with powers over life itself. the group set out to form the Grand Tale and live the greatest story ever told.

features.title: Features

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Grand Tale is a high-fantasy social life-sim game which hosts sub-games of multiple genres. The game is set in a world where players can explore, create, and explore their own worlds. The game is a living, breathing world that respects your time and intelligence.

q1.question: What is Grand Tale?
q1.answer: Grand Tale is a high-fantasy social life-sim game which hosts sub-games of multiple genres. The game is set in a world where players can explore, create, and explore their own worlds. The game is a living, breathing world that respects your time and intelligence.

q2.question: When will Grand Tale be released?
q2.answer: Grand Tale is currently in active development. Stay tuned to our news section for release date announcements.

q3.question: On which platforms will Grand Tale be available?
q3.answer: We are targeting a multi-platform release including PC and major consoles.

q1.question: What can I do in Grand Tale?
q1.answer: You can explore a vast open world, engage in various sub-games across different genres, build your own home, and socialize with players worldwide.

q2.question: Is there a multiplayer mode?
q2.answer: Yes! Grand Tale is a social experience at its core, featuring persistent multiplayer environments and collaborative activities.

q3.question: Can I customize my character?
q3.answer: Extensively. Our deep character creator allows you to define your look, while our progression system lets you define your playstyle.

q1.question: What are the system requirements?
q1.answer: System requirements will be finalized closer to release. We aim to support a wide range of hardware.

q2.question: Does Grand Tale support controllers?
q2.answer: Yes, Grand Tale will feature full controller support on all platforms.

q3.question: How do I report a bug?
q3.answer: During our testing phases, you can report bugs through our official discord or the support section of our website.

faq.footer: Have a question that isn't covered in this FAQ? Check out our {link}.
